steps.title: Translate the percentage statement to an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 250 percent of n is 45 translates to:
$$2.5n = 45$$
(since 250% = 2.5)

steps.title: Solve for n by dividing both sides by 2.5
Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice D — $18$, $18$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D.
